summary: Health monitor now honors its artifact contract, keeps latest state separate from history, and correctly reports the live marketing verifier failure instead of falsely reporting the system healthy.

verified_repairs.claim: health_monitor.py writes a parseable latest-state artifact and a separate append-only history log.
verified_repairs.details: health_monitor.py now writes agents/system/logs/health_monitor_latest.json via LATEST_FILE and appends history to agents/system/logs/health_monitor.jsonl via HISTORY_FILE.

verified_repairs.claim: health_monitor.py no longer carries the stale blocked-channel-followup topology residue.
verified_repairs.details: Direct source inspection shows blocked-channel-followup is absent from agents/system/health_monitor.py while blocked-channel-deep-review remains the live key job.

verified_repairs.claim: health_monitor.py detects live full-contract loop verification failures instead of falsely returning green.
verified_repairs.details: Direct run of python3 /home/mistlight/.openclaw/workspace/agents/system/health_monitor.py returned one loop_verification_fail issue for agents/marketing/logs/marketing_loop_independent_verification.json, and agents/system/logs/health_monitor_latest.json records issues_found=1 with verdict=fail for the marketing independent verifier artifact.

remaining_blockers: The system is not globally healthy yet because agents/marketing/logs/marketing_loop_independent_verification.json still has verdict=fail.

Marketing remains blocked on real owner-loop evidence: marketing_momentum_watchdog.json reports status=needs_attention and marketing_workflow_audit_latest.json still shows repair_window_status=measurement_pending with failing tactics.

evidence.summary: Source now uses health_monitor_latest.json for latest state, health_monitor.jsonl for history, and inspects marketing_loop_independent_verification.json for required verdict=pass.
Latest monitor run at 2026-05-21T21:13:30.013849 records issues_found=1 and surfaces the live marketing loop_verification_fail instead of reporting zero issues.
Current marketing independent verifier verdict is fail.
Current status is needs_attention with actions no_recent_reddit_post, apollo_channel_blocked, and primary_repo_adoption_flat.
Current audit still shows repair_window_status=measurement_pending and failing tactics for reddit_style_repetition and flat adoption windows.
